---
name: Idea
about: Propose a feature or direction, shaped like a Strata idea artifact
labels: idea
---

<!--
Strata tracks proposals as "idea" artifacts with three sections. Using
the same shape here means an accepted proposal can be parked into
archaeology/ideas/ nearly verbatim.

Ideas are never load-bearing: acceptance parks the idea for a future
sprint to adopt or reject — it is a recorded possibility, not a
roadmap promise. Check archaeology/ideas/ first; your idea may already
be parked, adopted, or rejected with reasoning attached.
-->

## Problem

<!-- The concrete problem this solves. What goes wrong today, for whom?
A real motivating instance beats a hypothetical. -->

## Sketch

<!-- The smallest version that helps. How does it honor the project
invariants (files canonical, no hostage-taking, Git optional)? -->

## Evidence

<!-- Prior art, related dragons/decisions/ideas in the archaeology,
anything suggesting this is worth its complexity. -->
